title: CozyHaven
description: Welcome to the coziest modpack, filled with tons of explorable, beautiful lands and building blocks for your tiny haven. I hope you enjoy this pack!
body:
# WE ARE NO LONGER UPDATING OR GIVING SUPPORT FOR COZYHAVEN DUE TO OUR [NEW MODPACK](https://modrinth.com/modpack/homestead)  👀



![CozyHaven Modrinth Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef15034d26d61e960e811722394450a33eeeb9ea.png)

## **🍂Dive into the ULTIMATE cozy adventure with Cozy Haven!🍂**

**🧸This thoughtfully crafted modpack elevates your Minecraft journey with stunning aesthetics, practical features, and limitless exploration. Whether you're adventuring solo or teaming up with friends, this pack delivers the ideal mix of creativity, performance, and enjoyment.🧸**

![Features Modrinth Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9163ffd03ed927bd3db45b23566381f06661988f.png)

- 🖥️ **Recommended Settings**: For the best experience, allocate **4GB - 8GB of RAM** to ensure smooth gameplay and stability.
- 🚀 **Peak Performance for All**: Enjoy seamless gameplay on both low-end and high-end devices with robust optimizations.
- ⚙️ **Ingenious Innovations**: Unleash your creativity with the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mod and its powerful addons.
- 🌱 **Bountiful Harvests**: Dive into enriched farming adventures with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) and its numerous addons.
- 🏗️ **Creative Building Tools**: Design and decorate with mods such as [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped), [Beautify](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated), [Hearth & Home](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearth-and-home), and more.
- 🌎 **Boundless Biomes**: Discover awe-inspiring biomes with mods like [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored), [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic), and [YUNG's](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG) world-enhancing tweaks.
- ⛵ **Adventures Beyond Limits**: Soar the skies with [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft), navigate the seas with [Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships), and explore the dramatic [Better End](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend).
- 🤝 **Multiplayer Made Better**: Share treasures with [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/lootr), team up with [Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes), and elevate your co-op experience.
- ☁️ **Stunning Shaders**: Enjoy the [Complimentary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shaders from EminGT with amazing looking graphics while also being performance-friendly!
- 🎶 **Custom Made OSTs**: Experience a unique musical journey with original soundtracks created by me and my friend [Yim.wav](https://solo.to/yimwav), designed to enhance the atmosphere and immerse you in the game’s world.

With over 300 mods to explore, Cozy Haven transforms your Minecraft world into a vibrant, dynamic realm of endless adventure. Plus, we're always evolving—so join the community to share your ideas and feedback!

💬 Join our Discord! [https://discord.gg/cozycord](https://discord.gg/cozycord)
